_notes: Most recent entry first. Append new entries to the top of `entries`. Schema: {version, date, title, summary, tags[], sections:[{heading,bullets[]}], links?:[{label,href}]}. Versions follow 'v<MAJOR>-<YYYY-MM-DD>'. Keep summaries to 1-2 sentences and bullets terse — this is what users read on /changelog.

entries.title: V3 Scoring Overhaul
entries.summary: Replaced the 3-dimension heuristic composite with a 6-dimension quality vector and a soft-floor truth gate, added 20 adversarial tasks to pull the top of the leaderboard apart, hardened the closed-book sandbox, and surfaced real per-pillar data on the site.

sections.heading: Scoring
bullets: New composite: composite_v3 = (0.5 + 0.5 × quote_match) × Σ w_d · score_d across 6 quality dims (coverage, depth, rigor, style, checklist, spec).
Soft-floor replaces the hard multiplicative gate — broken citations no longer zero out an entire report, but quote_match still scales the result.
Three new LLM-judge verifiers (depth, rigor, style), each 5-point rubric with self-consistency (3× temp 0.3, median), CoT disabled.
New ArenaEvaluator (src/eval/evaluator.py) exposes a callable reward function for downstream RL training loops.

sections.heading: Separability
bullets: Current leaderboard separability measured at 62.86% — 2.14 pp below the 65% intermediate target.
20 adversarial tasks generated across 3 families (causal/debunking, synthesis-under-contradiction, long-tail recall) to stress the new dims.
Top-pair densification (--strategy top-pair-densify) added to the battle runner; n=20 per top pair drops CI half-width from ~70 to ~25 Elo.

sections.heading: Sandbox
bullets: New --strict-sandbox flag enforces the closed-book contract at three layers: per-adapter tool allowlist, shim-level 403 gate on non-localhost URLs, and post-run domain audit.
Closed the ClaudeCode Bash-curl gap by replacing the disallowlist with --allowed-tools Bash(curl http://localhost*).
OpenCode now ships a per-run opencode.json with commands.allowed rather than relying on a soft prompt.
8 runners are strict-eligible end-to-end; 9 others remain best-effort via the shim and audit layers.

sections.heading: Human alignment
bullets: Pairwise A/B preference collector lives at tools/human_pref_collector/ (vanilla HTML + 50-LOC stdlib server, keyboard shortcuts a/s/d).
Bradley-Terry weight fit via softmax reparameterization + L-BFGS-B (16 restarts); 5-fold CV refuses to publish weights worse than uniform baseline.
Targets Spearman ≥ 0.85 with humans on composite ranking once ≥ 200 preferences land.

sections.heading: Site
bullets: Replaced the synthetic 7-bar sparkline with a real 8-dimension per-pillar sparkline (depth, rigor, style, coverage, checklist, spec, reachability, quote_match) with hover tooltips.
New Quality Profile card on each agent's detail page.
New “Deepest reports” highlight tile on the homepage.
Dry-run banner renders when the leaderboard data is synthetic so visitors are not misled by placeholder numbers.
Adjacent-pair statistical significance now marked with an asterisk on the leaderboard.
